applied_optimizations.name: Triton kernel with coalesced memory reads
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented Triton kernel with 2D grid (batch_size, num_tiles) and coalesced memory reads. Key insight: in NCHW layout, for fixed (batch, channel), HW positions are contiguous. Each program loads contiguous HW tiles for each channel, achieving coalesced reads. Also added .contiguous() after conv to ensure memory layout is correct.

attempted_but_failed.name: One program per spatial position
attempted_but_failed.reason: Correct but slow (10.3ms) due to kernel launch overhead and strided memory access

top_bottlenecks: Channel reduction loop (128 iterations per tile)

notes: Key optimizations: coalesced memory reads, 2D grid parallelization, contiguous memory layout
BLOCK_HW=256 works well for 254*254=64516 HW positions (253 tiles per batch)
